summary: Phase 6a cold verification. Backend: 12/12 test_phase6.py pass, Phase 5 regression 26 passed + 1 skipped. OpenAPI endpoint count = 134 (up from 132; +2 as expected: /admin/seed/reset-demo + /vendors/leaderboard/fast-responders). Startup logs confirm 'Emergent backend started (Phase 0-6)' and 'Auto-seed: skipping (already have N listings)'. Frontend: landing shows LanguageToggle + landing-stats (20+ vendors / 157+ listings / 10 cities), Hindi toggle re-renders hero in Devanagari and persists 'emergent_lang'='hi' in localStorage. PWA manifest link, apple-touch-icon, theme-color meta all present; SW registration succeeds (1 registration). /vendor/analytics renders FastRespondersPanel with 5 ranked vendors (rank, city, trust score, avg response time, chat_response_rate). All Phase 6a acceptance criteria met.

issues: Top 3 responders in this preview DB are leftover TEST_RT_V_* / V1 users (from a prior test run) with no city (shown as '—'). Not a Phase 6a bug, but re-running POST /admin/seed/reset-demo?wipe=true would clean the leaderboard for demo screenshots.

critical_code_review_comments: Fast Responder leaderboard sort direction validated (ASC by avg_response_time_seconds), city filter case-insensitive exact match works.
PWA apple-touch-icon uses api.dicebear.com/shapes/svg placeholder — fine for dev, replace with a real 192x192 PNG icon before store submission.
Seed endpoint dev-mode gate: relies on *_DEV_MODE flags. Should be double-checked before any staging/prod deploy so accidental /admin/seed/reset-demo cannot wipe real data.
test_credentials: Admin phone 9999999999 (dev OTP). Fresh vendor per test run (9812xxxxxx pattern).
seed_data_creation: One fresh vendor TEST_Vendor created (phone 98xxxxxxxx) to log into /vendor/analytics for FastRespondersPanel verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6a fully verified. Endpoints total = 134. Auto-seed on startup + Phase 0-6 log line present in backend.err.log. If FastRespondersPanel shows stale TEST_RT_V_* users, run POST /api/v1/admin/seed/reset-demo?wipe=true (admin auth) to reset demo data. Phase 6b items intentionally deferred: onboarding tour, branded 404/500, error boundaries.
